creator: hhyou@cs.nctu.edu.tw
text:
Hello,

  vmail checks RUBY_VERSION after v1.5.0,
  (vmail will exit if RUBY_VERSION less than 1.9)
  should we upgrade this port after default ruby version changes to 1.9 ?

Best Regards.

2011/6/24 Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org>:
> Maintainer of mail/rubygem-vmail,
>
> Please note that PR ports/158217 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
> =A0 =A0http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/158217
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>



--=20
Hsin-Han You
Mobile and Pervasive Computing Lab
Department of Computer Science, National Chiao Tung University
Email: hhyou <at> cs.nctu.edu.tw
